A purposeful farm retreat near Raigad Fort, Raigad. Built for groups who want more than a getaway.

Plan Your Trip →
● 22–28 guests per trip | ● Raigad Fort, 25km away | ● Pune: 2.5 hrs | ● Mumbai: 3 hrs | ● Vegetarian · Farm-grown meals
What is Mitraay?

A farm retreat that gives groups a story worth telling.

Mitraay Agro Resort is set on a working farm in Raigad, Maharashtra, surrounded by the Sahyadri hills, Ulhas river, and the ancient walls of Raigad Fort. We host groups of 22–28 for two to three-night stays focused on real experiences: farm work, fire-cooked meals, Sahyadri treks, and time away from screens.

Whether you're a trekking or adventure group, a school group seeking hands-on learning, or a wellness retreat coming together, Mitraay gives your trip a shape and a memory.

See the Property → Plan a Visit →
Three ways to experience Mitraay

What brings you here?

Recharge

Retreat

Yoga, spiritual, and wellness retreats. Guided sessions, farm-grown meals, complete privacy.

Plan a retreat →
Explore outdoors

Adventure

River treks, waterfall visits, Raigad Fort, bonfire nights, farm activities: custom planned for your group.

Explore adventures →
Learn by doing

School Trips

Paddy planting, cooking classes, Raigad Fort history, nature trails. Safe, structured, unforgettable.

Plan a school trip →

Everything your group needs

WiFi across the property Free parking Hot water in all rooms Western washrooms Indoor dining pavilion Yoga and event pavilion Sound system Karaoke on request Large TV for presentations Bonfire area First aid on property Vegetarian farm-grown meals
